name: Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Breed Series Golden Retriever Hypoallergenic 8kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Golden Retriever Adult Dog Food is a super-premium dry diet for dogs 10+ months. Supports joint health, digestion, immunity, heart & eye health, skin & coat, and dental care.
description: Complete & Balanced Super Premium Dry Food for Golden Retriever Dogs (10+ Months) Reflex Plus Golden Retriever Adult Dog Food is a complete and balanced dry diet specially formulated for Golden Retrievers over 10 months old. Made with high-quality animal proteins and functional ingredients, it supports joint health, digestion, skin and coat condition, heart and eye health, and oral hygiene. Enriched with glucosamine, chondroitin sulfate, prebiotics, taurine, Aloe Vera, brown algae, and marigold extract, this formula promotes immune system health, joint flexibility, urinary and dental health, and overall vitality for adult Golden Retrievers. Key Benefits Formulated specifically for Golden Retrievers (10+ months) 83% of total protein comes from premium animal ingredients Supports immune and digestive system health (FOS & MOS prebiotics) Promotes joint health and flexibility (Glucosamine & Chondroitin Sulfate) Supports heart and eye health (Taurine) Promotes skin and coat condition (Aloe Vera & Marigold Extract) Boosts oral and dental health (Brown Algae) Complete nutrition for adult Golden Retrievers Ingredients Processed chicken protein (26%), Corn, Rice, Chicken fat, Hydrolyzed chicken protein, Pea protein, Fish protein, Fish oil, Dried sugar beet, Liver flavor, Vitamins and minerals, Fiber concentrate, Nucleotide yeast protein, Psyllium fiber, Dried brewer’s yeast, Brown algae, Blueberry, MOS (mannan-oligosaccharides), Flaxseed, Yucca schidigera, Salt, Aloe Vera, L-carnitine, FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides), Glucosamine, Chondroitin sulfate, Marigold extract, Taurine (3A370), Preservatives and antioxidants (E320 & E321). Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 25% Crude Fat: 14% Crude Ash: 7% Crude Fibre: 3% Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 200 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg B Vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, Biotin, Folic Acid), Vitamin K3, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate Taurine: included Minerals: Iron, Iodine, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium Feeding Guidelines Suitable for Golden Retrievers aged 10 months and above Feed according to age, weight, and activity level Provide fresh drinking water at all times Introduce new food gradually over 5–7 days Store in a cool, dry place
